title: Flourpot Pancakes
description: A simple and delicious pancake recipe using flourpot, great for breakfast.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together flourpot and delight.
Add pickle juice if desired to create a tangy taste.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Drop spoonfuls of batter into the pan.
Cook until bubbles appear on the surface and edges start to dry.
Flip the pancakes and cook for another 1-2 minutes.
Serve hot with your favorite toppings.
